data.title: Umatoll Tricycle for Toddlers 2-5 Year Old, Ajustable Toddler Bike Outdoor Toys, Birthday Gift for Girl Age 2-4, Trike with L

features: DURABLE AND STURDY: The Umatoll tricycle is made with top quality carbon steel
equipped with spring buckles and reinforced screws for a solid
long-lasting structure that will grow with your child.
SMOOTH AND SAFE RIDE: The toddler tricycle features extended rear wheels and a wide wheelbase
effectively preventing tipping. It provides a stable and secure ride
giving your child the confidence to learn to ride and build muscle strength.
GROWS WITH TODDLER: Featuring a 3-position adjustable seat
the tricycle is perfect for toddler aged 2 to 5
adapting to your child’s growing needs as she learns to pedal and steer.
DUAL BASKETS: The removable front and rear baskets allow your little one to easily carry their favorite toys or treasures
making it perfect for rides in the yard or outdoor adventures.
LIGHT-UP FUN: The rear wheels light up with every turn—no batteries needed! These colorful lights add extra fun to every ride
making it an exciting gift for your little one.
